Apparently this is just a very brief flashback section and the majority will take place in current 40k with primaris marines in all the new bad looking armour and vehicles. I can totally believe that this is the case since GW hates first born. If it is the case I feel extremely mislead and manipulated. This is nostalgia baiting and key jangling at its worst if true. We want a true spiritual successor to astartes 1 and that simply can’t be achieved in primaris armour. They’re frankly far too safe and halo looking to fit into the grim dark aesthetic that the artist had in the first one.

from nltk.corpus import wordnet as wn

word = ""significance""
sentence = ""Praise be to anyone who can see the significance in both.""

hypernyms = [lemma.name() for synset in wn.synsets(word) for lemma in synset.lemmas() if lemma.name() not in sentence and lemma.hypernyms()]

print(hypernyms) in both."

He’s not wrong films the last 10years are mostly bs. Comedy is nearly everyone’s favorite genre… when not half cooked. Who doesn’t like to laugh?! Movies today just don’t give you much to love. With the exception of a few.. but the stars fizzle as soon as their “real” personality is visible. Most people who pursue fame are obsessed with themselves… is it a necessary evil? I don’t think so… it’s a choice. For example Jennifer Lopez- pays a real singer to be the actual talent for her “hit” album. (Milli Vanilli- without the blow back in her case). No one likes to be tricked. It’s like calling you stupid without the balls or decency to say it plainly to your face.
